meaning: n.(腌肉、菜等用的)盐汁,醋汁,腌渍品,泡菜vt.腌,泡
examples: Select your favourite fruit or veg and pickle them while they are still fresh.
Pickle juice has long been touted as a fix for cramping muscles, and now a recent study lends even more credibility to this home remedy.
Mr Simon, already under fire for being a cultural conservative, is now in a pickle.
Here is the problem and it is more of a pickle than most people realize.
